name: pi-mcp-unity
description: Bridges the CoplayDev open-source Unity MCP into pi. Runs `mcp-for-unity` locally via uvx (stdio); requires the MCPForUnity package in your Unity project and 'Start Server' in the Unity > MCP window. Tools register as coplaydev_unity__*. Run: /unity-mcp for status (or '/unity-mcp reconnect'); /concept-to-scene <concept> for the Higgsfield+Unity closed loop.
